summary: Classification is blocked for all ten PRs because the cluster preflight could not hydrate live GitHub state due installation API rate limits. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected in the failed preflight, and no close/comment/label/merge/fix action is safe without hydrated bodies, comments, review comments, diffs, checks, state, and updated_at values.
